requirements.full_sentence:
These Directions shall be called the Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking
Financial Companies - Credit Cards: Issuance and Conduct) Directions, 2025.
requirements.object: Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Credit Cards: Issuance and Conduct) Directions, 2025

requirements.full_sentence: These Directions shall come into force with immediate effect.
requirements.object: immediate effect

requirements.full_sentence:
These Directions shall be applicable to following Non-Banking Financial Company
(hereinafter collectively referred to as 'NBFCs' and individually as an 'NBFC'), for
all layers, unless specified otherwise:
Note: The applicability under these Directions is in line with the regulatory
structure for NBFCs as set out in Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial
Companies - Registration, Exemptions and Framework for Scale Based
Regulation) Directions, 2025.
requirements.object: Non-Banking Financial Company (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'NBFCs' and individually as an 'NBFC'), for all layers

requirements.full_sentence:
These Directions cover the general and conduct regulations relating to credit and
co-branded cards which shall be read along with prudential, payment and
technology & cyber security related Directions applicable to credit and co-
branded cards, as issued by the Reserve Bank.
requirements.object: prudential, payment and technology & cyber security related Directions applicable to credit and co- branded cards, as issued by the

requirements.full_sentence:
In these Directions, unless the context otherwise requires, the terms herein shall
bear the meanings assigned to them below:
(1) Add-on Credit Card means a supplementary credit card to the principal or
primary credit card, issued to person/s with predefined relationship with the
primary cardholder, within the credit limits and liability of the latter, subject to
such terms and conditions as stipulated by the card-issuer.
requirements.object: to them below: (1) Add-on Credit Card means a supplementary credit card to the principal or primary credit card, issued to person/s with predefined relationship with the primary cardholder, within the credit limits and liability of the latter

requirements.full_sentence:
(19) Principal Cardholder means the customer who has been issued credit card
by a card-issuer and on whose name the card account has been opened.
requirements.object: been issued credit card by a card-issuer and on whose name the card account has been opened

requirements.full_sentence:
Provided that the issuance of a credit card for renewal or replacement shall
not be treated as an unsolicited card.
requirements.object: unsolicited card

requirements.full_sentence:
(22) Upgradation of Credit Card means enhancement in the benefits and
features of credit cards issued, for example, an increase in the credit or cash
limit of the card.
requirements.object: and features of credit cards issued, for example, an increase in the credit or cash limit of the card

requirements.full_sentence:
All other expressions unless defined herein shall have the same meaning as have
been assigned to them under the Banking Regulation Act, 1949 or the Reserve
Bank of India Act, 1934 or any statutory modification or re-enactment thereto or
as used in commercial parlance, as the case may be.
requirements.object: as have been assigned to them under the Banking Regulation Act, 1949 or the Reserve Bank of India Act, 1934 or any statutory mod

requirements.full_sentence:
Non-Banking Financial Companies registered with the Reserve Bank shall not
undertake credit card business without prior approval of the Reserve Bank.
requirements.object: without prior approval of the Reserve Bank

requirements.full_sentence:
Any
company including a non-deposit taking company intending to engage in this
activity shall require a Certificate of Registration, apart from specific permission
to enter into this business, the pre-requisite for which is a minimum net owned
fund of ₹100 crore and subject to such terms and conditions as the Reserve Bank
may specify in this regard from time to time.
requirements.object: Registration, apart from specific permission to enter into this business, the pre-requisite for which is a minimum net owned

requirements.full_sentence:
Without obtaining prior approval from
the Reserve Bank, NBFCs shall not issue, credit cards, charge cards, or similar
products virtually or physically.
requirements.object: cards, or similar products virtually or physically

requirements.full_sentence:
Each card-issuer shall have a well-documented Board approved policy for the
issuance and conduct of credit cards.
requirements.object: approved policy for the issuance and conduct of credit cards

requirements.full_sentence:
The Board approved policy shall be in
consonance with various instructions on the subject issued by the Reserve Bank
from time to time, as well as these Directions.
requirements.object: various instructions on the subject issued by the Reserve Bank from time to time, as well as these Directions

requirements.full_sentence:
The Board approved policy shall
be available on the website of the card-issuer.
requirements.object: website of the card-issuer

requirements.full_sentence:
The policy should, inter alia, cover the following aspects:
(1) Interest rate ceiling and other charges.
requirements.object: the following aspects: (1) Interest rate ceiling and other charges

requirements.full_sentence:
Card-issuers shall put in place a mechanism for review of their credit card
operations on half-yearly basis by the Audit Committee of the Board of Directors.
requirements.object: mechanism for review of their credit card operations on half-yearly basis by the Audit Committee of the Board of Directors

requirements.full_sentence:
The review shall include, inter-alia, customer service, frauds, complaints and
grievance redressal, card usage analysis including cards not used for long
durations and the inherent risks therein.
requirements.object: frauds, complaints and grievance redressal, card usage analysis including cards not used for long durations and

requirements.full_sentence:
Customer Acquisition:
(1) Card-issuers shall provide a one-page Key Fact Statement along with the credit
card application containing the important aspects of the card such as rate of
interest, quantum of charges, among others.
requirements.object: Fact Statement along with the credit card application containing the important aspects of the card such as rate of interest, qu

conditions:
In case of rejection of a credit card
application
requirements.full_sentence:
In case of rejection of a credit card
application, the card-issuer shall convey in writing the specific reason/s which
led to the rejection of the application.
requirements.object: specific reason/s which led to the rejection of the application

requirements.full_sentence:
(2) The MITC as given in Chapter VI of these directions, shall be highlighted and
published / sent separately to the customers, at the acceptance stage
(welcome kit) and in important subsequent communications.
requirements.object: / sent separately to the customers, at the acceptance stage (welcome kit) and in important subsequent communications

requirements.full_sentence:
The MITC shall
be provided to the customer (preferably in English, Hindi and local language)
at the time of onboarding and each time, a condition is modified with notice to
the customer.
requirements.object: customer (preferably in English, Hindi and local language) at the time of onboarding and each time, a condition is modified with no

requirements.full_sentence:
The MITC and copy of the agreement signed /digitally signed
between the card-issuer and cardholder shall be sent to the registered email
address of the cardholder holder or postal address as per the choice of the
customer.
requirements.object: registered email address of the cardholder holder or postal address as per the choice of the customer

requirements.full_sentence:
(3) Card-issuers may consider introducing, at the option of the customers, an
insurance cover to take care of the liabilities arising out of lost cards, card
frauds, etc.
requirements.object: option of the customers, an insurance cover to take care of the liabilities arising out of lost cards, card frauds, etc

conditions:
where the card-issuers are offering any insurance cover
to their cardholders
requirements.full_sentence:
In cases where the card-issuers are offering any insurance cover
to their cardholders, in tie-up with insurance companies, the card-issuers shall
obtain explicit consent in writing or in digital mode from the cardholders along
with the details of nominee/s.
requirements.object: writing or in digital mode from the cardholders along with the details of nominee/s

requirements.full_sentence:
In case, an
unsolicited card is issued / existing card upgraded and activated without the
<image>
explicit consent of the recipient and the latter is billed for the same, the card-
issuer shall not only reverse the charges forthwith, but also pay a penalty
without demur to the recipient amounting to twice the value of the charges
reversed.
requirements.object: forthwith, but also pay a penalty without demur to the recipient amounting to twice the value of the charges reversed

conditions: In case a customer receives an unsolicited card
requirements.full_sentence:
Explanation: In case a customer receives an unsolicited card, he / she should
refrain from activating or providing consent for activation of card through OTP
or any other means.
requirements.object: providing consent for activation of card through OTP or any other means

conditions: If no consent is received for activating the card
requirements.full_sentence:
If no consent is received for activating the card, the card-
issuer is required to close the credit card account without any cost to the
customer within seven working days from the date of seeking confirmation from
the customer and shall also intimate the customer that the credit card account
has been closed.
requirements.object: that the credit card account has been closed

requirements.full_sentence:
Subsequent to receiving the intimation from the card-issuer
that the card account has been closed, the customer shall destroy the card.

It is emphasised that any loss arising out of misuse of such unsolicited cards
shall be the responsibility of the card-issuer only and the person in whose name
the card has been issued shall not be held responsible for the same.
requirements.object: the same

requirements.full_sentence:
(6)Card-issuers shall seek One Time Password (OTP) based consent from the
cardholder for activating a credit card, if the same has not been activated by
the customer for more than 30 days from the date of issuance.
requirements.object: (OTP) based consent from the cardholder for activating a credit card

conditions:
If no consent is
received for activating the card
requirements.full_sentence:
If no consent is
received for activating the card, card-issuers shall close the credit card account
without any cost to the customer within seven working days from date of
seeking confirmation from the customer.
requirements.object: account without any cost to the customer within seven working days from date of seeking confirmation from the customer

conditions: In case of a renewed or replaced card
requirements.full_sentence:
In case of a renewed or replaced card,
the closure of an inactivated card shall be subject to payment of all dues by the
cardholder.
requirements.object: of all dues by the cardholder

requirements.full_sentence:
Underwriting Standards:
(1) Card-issuers shall ensure prudence while issuing credit cards and
independently assess the credit risk while issuing cards to persons, taking into
account independent financial means of applicants.
requirements.object: credit cards and independently assess the credit risk while issuing cards to persons, taking into account independent fi

requirements.full_sentence:
(2) As holding several credit cards enhances the total credit available to any
consumer, card-issuers shall assess the credit limit for a credit card customer
taking into consideration all the limits enjoyed by the cardholder from other
entities on the basis of self-declaration / credit information obtained from a
Credit Information Company, as appropriate.
requirements.object: for a credit card customer taking into consideration all the limits enjoyed by the cardholder from other entities on the basis

requirements.full_sentence:
This shall be uniformly applied as
per the board approved policy of the card-issuer.
requirements.object: per the board approved policy of the card-issuer

requirements.full_sentence:
(3) Card-issuers shall ensure complete transparency in the conversion of credit
card transactions to Equated Monthly Instalments (EMIs) by clearly indicating
the principal, interest and upfront discount provided by the merchant/card-
issuer (to make it no cost), prior to the conversion.
requirements.object: the conversion of credit card transactions to Equated Monthly Instalments (EMIs) by clearly indicating the principal,

requirements.full_sentence:
The same shall also be
separately indicated in the credit card bill / statement.
requirements.object: in the credit card bill / statement

requirements.full_sentence:
EMI conversion with
interest component shall not be camouflaged as zero-interest / no-cost EMI.
requirements.object: / no-cost EMI

requirements.full_sentence:
(4) Card-issuers shall ensure that loans offered through credit cards are in
compliance with the instructions on loans and advances issued by the Reserve
Bank from time to time.
requirements.object: through credit cards are in compliance with the instructions on loans and advances issued by the Reserve Bank from time to t

requirements.full_sentence:
(5) Card-issuers shall ensure that the credit limit as sanctioned and advised to the
cardholder is not breached at any point in time without seeking explicit consent
from the cardholder.
requirements.object: limit as sanctioned and advised to the cardholder is not breached at any point in time without seeking explicit consent from th

requirements.full_sentence:
Further, a cardholder shall be given an option to
enable or disable the option of overlimit through transaction control mechanism
available on card-issuer's platforms such as internet, mobile banking, or any
other suitable medium.
requirements.object: to enable or disable the option of overlimit through transaction control mechanism available on card-issuer's platforms such as int

requirements.full_sentence:
Card-issuers may issue credit cards / charge cards to individuals for personal use
together with add-on cards wherever required.
requirements.object: charge cards to individuals for personal use together with add-on cards wherever required

requirements.full_sentence:
Card-issuers may issue business credit cards to business entities / individuals for
business expenses.
requirements.object: to business entities / individuals for business expenses

requirements.full_sentence:
The business credit cards may be issued as charge cards /
corporate credit cards.
requirements.object: cards / corporate credit cards

requirements.full_sentence:
The card-issuers shall put in place effective mechanism to monitor end use of
funds.
requirements.object: mechanism to monitor end use of funds

requirements.full_sentence:
The liability of the corporate / business entity on account of business cards shall
form part of their total assessed credits for compliance to instructions issued by
the Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Concentration
Risk Management) Directions, 2025, as well as the Reserve Bank of India (Non-
Banking Financial Companies - Income Recognition, Asset Classification and
Provisioning) Directions, 2025, as amended from time to time.
requirements.object: total assessed credits for compliance to instructions issued by the Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Concen

requirements.full_sentence:
The add-on cards shall be issued only to the persons specifically identified by the
principal cardholder under both personal and business credit card categories.
requirements.object: the persons specifically identified by the principal cardholder under both personal and business credit card categories

requirements.full_sentence:
Add-on cards shall be issued with the clear understanding that the liability will be
that of the principal cardholder.
requirements.object: clear understanding that the liability will be that of the principal cardholder

requirements.full_sentence:
Similarly, while issuing corporate credit cards, the
responsibilities and liabilities of the corporate and its employees shall be clearly
specified.

The liability of the corporate/business entity shall form part of its
assessed credits.
requirements.object: assessed credits

requirements.full_sentence:
Explanation: The liability for dues shall rest solely with the principal cardholder
and not with the add-on cardholders.
requirements.object: principal cardholder and not with the add-on cardholders

requirements.full_sentence:
However, settlement of dues towards
international credit card shall also be governed as per FEMA regulations.
requirements.object: per FEMA regulations

requirements.full_sentence:
Any request for closure of a credit card shall be honoured within seven working
days by the credit card-issuer, subject to payment of all dues by the cardholder.
requirements.object: working days by the credit card-issuer

requirements.full_sentence:
Subsequent to the closure of credit card, the cardholder shall be immediately
notified about the closure through email, SMS, etc.
requirements.object: the closure through email, SMS, etc

requirements.full_sentence:
Cardholders shall be provided
option to submit request for closure of credit card account through multiple
channels such as helpline, dedicated email-id, Interactive Voice Response (IVR),
prominently visible link on the website, internet banking, mobile-app or any other
mode.
requirements.object: submit request for closure of credit card account through multiple channels such as helpline, dedicated email-id, Interactive Vo

requirements.full_sentence:
The card-issuer shall not insist on sending a closure request through post
or any other means which may result in the delay of receipt of the request.
requirements.object: closure request through post or any other means which may result in the delay of receipt of the request

requirements.full_sentence:
Failure
on the part of the card-issuers to complete the process of closure within seven
working days shall result in a penalty of ₹500 per calendar day of delay payable
to the cardholder, till the closure of the account provided there is no outstanding
in the account.
requirements.object: of ₹500 per calendar day of delay payable to the cardholder, till the closure of the account provided there is no outstanding in t

conditions: In case payment towards dues is outstanding
requirements.full_sentence:
Explanation: In case payment towards dues is outstanding, the card-issuer shall
provide details regarding such outstanding dues to the cardholder upon receipt
of the closure request without waiting for completion of the billing cycle and
accordingly advise him / her to make payment in order to complete the closure
process.
requirements.object: outstanding dues to the cardholder upon receipt of the closure request without waiting for completion of the billing cy

requirements.full_sentence:
In such cases, the prescribed timeline of seven working days shall be
calculated after excluding the number of days taken by the cardholder to clear
the outstanding dues.
requirements.object: the number of days taken by the cardholder to clear the outstanding dues

requirements.full_sentence:
The card-issuer shall also report to CICs suitably about the
closure of the card account.
requirements.object: suitably about the closure of the card account

conditions: If a credit card has not been used for a period of more than one year
requirements.full_sentence:
If a credit card has not been used for a period of more than one year, the process
to close the card shall be initiated after intimating the cardholder.
requirements.object: the cardholder

conditions:
If no reply is
received from the cardholder within a period of 30 days
requirements.full_sentence:
If no reply is
received from the cardholder within a period of 30 days, the card account shall
be closed by the card-issuer, subject to payment of all dues by the cardholder.
requirements.object: card-issuer

requirements.full_sentence:
The information regarding the closure of card account shall also accordingly be
updated with the Credit Information Company/ies within a period of 30 days.
requirements.object: with the Credit Information Company/ies within a period of 30 days

requirements.full_sentence:
Subsequent to closure of credit card account, any credit balance available in
credit card accounts shall be transferred to the cardholder's bank account.
requirements.object: cardholder's bank account

requirements.full_sentence:
Card-
issuers shall obtain the details of the cardholder's bank account, if the same is
not available with them.
requirements.object: the cardholder's bank account

requirements.full_sentence:
Card-issuers shall be guided by the Reserve Bank of India (NBFCs - Interest
Rates on Advances) Directions, 2025 as amended from time to time, while
determining the interest rate on credit card dues.
requirements.object: Reserve Bank of India (NBFCs - Interest Rates on Advances) Directions, 2025 as amended from time to time, while determining the inter

requirements.full_sentence:
Interest charged on credit cards
shall be justifiable having regard to the cost incurred and the extent of return that
could be reasonably expected by the card-issuer.
requirements.object: to the cost incurred and the extent of return that could be reasonably expected by the card-issuer

requirements.full_sentence:
Card-issuers shall also
prescribe an interest rate ceiling in line with other unsecured loans, including
processing and other charges, in respect of credit cards as part of their Board
approved policy.
requirements.object: rate ceiling in line with other unsecured loans, including processing and other charges, in respect of credit cards as part

conditions:
In case card-issuers charge interest rates which vary based on
the payment / default history of the cardholder
requirements.full_sentence:
In case card-issuers charge interest rates which vary based on
the payment / default history of the cardholder, there shall be transparency in
levying such differential interest rates.
requirements.object: such differential interest rates

requirements.full_sentence:
The interest rates as prescribed in the
board approved policy and the rationale for the same shall be auditable.

The card-
issuers shall publicise through their website and other means, the interest rates
charged to various categories of customers.
requirements.object: and other means, the interest rates charged to various categories of customers

requirements.full_sentence:
Card-issuers shall indicate upfront
to the credit cardholder, the methodology of calculation of finance charges with
illustrative examples, particularly in situations where only a part of the amount
outstanding is paid by the customer.
requirements.object: credit cardholder, the methodology of calculation of finance charges with illustrative examples, particularly in situations wh

requirements.full_sentence:
Further, the card-issuers shall adhere to the following directions relating to
interest rates and other charges on credit cards:
(1) Card-issuers shall quote Annualized Percentage Rates (APR) on credit cards
for different situations such as retail purchases, balance transfer, cash
advances, non-payment of minimum amount due, late payment etc., if different.
requirements.object: directions relating to interest rates and other charges on credit cards: (1) Card-issuers shall quote Annualized Percentage Rates (APR) on credit cards for different situations such as retail purchases, balance transfer, cash advances, non-payment of minimum amount due, late payment etc.

requirements.full_sentence:
The method of calculation of APR shall be given with clear examples for better
comprehension.
requirements.object: examples for better comprehension

requirements.full_sentence:
The APR charged, and the annual fee shall be shown with
equal prominence.
requirements.object: prominence

requirements.full_sentence:
The late payment charges, including the method of
<image>
calculation of such charges and the number of days, shall be prominently
indicated.

The manner in which the outstanding unpaid amount has been
arrived at for calculation of interest shall also be specifically shown with
prominence in all the billing statements.
requirements.object: with prominence in all the billing statements

requirements.full_sentence:
These aspects shall also be shown in
the Welcome Kit in addition to being shown in the billing statements.
requirements.object: the Welcome Kit in addition to being shown in the billing statements

requirements.full_sentence:
(2) The terms and conditions for payment of credit card dues, including the
minimum amount due, shall be stipulated so as to ensure there is no negative
amortization.
requirements.object: to ensure there is no negative amortization

requirements.full_sentence:
Card -issuers shall not capitalize i.e., levy interest or any other
charges, on the unpaid taxes/levies/charges
Illustration: The outstanding amount of a credit card account at the end of
month A is ₹10,000.

The
Minimum Amount Due (MAD) for the month A shall be calculated in a way that
it does not result in negative amortization.
requirements.object: way that it does not result in negative amortization

requirements.full_sentence:
Accordingly, the MAD shall not be
less than ₹250 (indicative figure), so as to avoid capitalisation of interest or
other charges in the subsequent statement.
requirements.object: (indicative figure), so as to avoid capitalisation of interest or other charges in the subsequent statement

requirements.full_sentence:
(3) Card-issuers shall inform the cardholders of the implications of paying only 'the
minimum amount due'.
requirements.object: the implications of paying only 'the minimum amount due'

requirements.full_sentence:
A legend / warning to the effect that "Making only the
minimum payment every month would result in the repayment stretching over
months / years with consequential compounded interest payment on your
outstanding balance" shall be prominently displayed in all the billing statements
to caution the cardholders about the pitfalls in paying only the minimum amount
due.
requirements.object: all the billing statements to caution the cardholders about the pitfalls in paying only the minimum amount due

requirements.full_sentence:
The MITC shall specifically explain that the 'interest-free credit period' is
suspended if any balance of the previous month's bill is outstanding.
requirements.object: 'interest-free credit period' is suspended if any balance of the previous month's bill is outstanding

requirements.full_sentence:
(4) For this purpose, card-issuers shall work out illustrative examples and include
the same in the Welcome Kit sent to the cardholders and also place it on their
website.
requirements.object: and include the same in the Welcome Kit sent to the cardholders and also place it on their website

requirements.full_sentence:
(5) Card-issuers shall report a credit card account as 'past due' to credit
information companies (CICs) or levy penal charges, viz.
requirements.object: account as 'past due' to credit information companies (CICs) or levy penal charges, viz

requirements.full_sentence:
The number of 'days past due' and late payment
charges shall, however, be computed from the payment due date mentioned
in the credit card statement, as specified under the Reserve Bank of India (Non-
Banking Financial Companies - Income Recognition, Asset Classification and
Provisioning) Directions, 2025, as amended from time to time.
requirements.object: from the payment due date mentioned in the credit card statement, as specified under the Reserve Bank of India (Non- Banking Fi

requirements.full_sentence:
Late payment
charges and other related charges shall be levied, only on the outstanding
amount after the due date, and not on the total amount due.
requirements.object: the outstanding amount after the due date, and not on the total amount due

requirements.full_sentence:
(6) Interest shall be levied only on the outstanding amount, adjusted for payments
/ refunds / reversed transactions.
requirements.object: the outstanding amount, adjusted for payments / refunds / reversed transactions

conditions:
In case a cardholder makes partial payment or does not clear the
total amount due within the payment due date
requirements.full_sentence:
Explanation: In case a cardholder makes partial payment or does not clear the
total amount due within the payment due date, interest free credit period will
be lost, and interest may be levied from the date of transaction on the
outstanding amount (adjusted for payments / refunds / reversed transactions
as and when credited) and not on the total amount due.
requirements.object: date of transaction on the outstanding amount (adjusted for payments / refunds / reversed transactions as and when credited) and no

requirements.full_sentence:
Further, late payment
fee and other charges relating to delay in payment shall be levied only on the
outstanding amount (adjusted for payments / refunds / reversed transactions
as and when credited) after the payment due date and not on the total amount
due.
requirements.object: the outstanding amount (adjusted for payments / refunds / reversed transactions as and when credited) after the payment due date and

requirements.full_sentence:
(7) Changes in charges shall be made only with prospective effect giving prior
notice of at least one month.
requirements.object: prospective effect giving prior notice of at least one month

conditions:
If a cardholder desires to surrender his / her card
on account of any change in charges to his / her disadvantage
requirements.full_sentence:
If a cardholder desires to surrender his / her card
on account of any change in charges to his / her disadvantage, he / she shall
be permitted to do so without levying any extra charge for such closure, subject
to payment of all dues by the cardholder.
requirements.object: so without levying any extra charge for such closure

requirements.full_sentence: (8) There shall not be any hidden charges while issuing credit cards free of charge.
requirements.object: while issuing credit cards free of charge

requirements.full_sentence:
Card-issuers shall ensure that there is no delay in sending / dispatching / emailing
bills / statements and the customer has sufficient number of days (at least one
fortnight) for making payment before the interest starts getting charged.
requirements.object: no delay in sending / dispatching / emailing bills / statements and the customer has sufficient number of days (at least one fort

requirements.full_sentence:
In order
to obviate frequent complaints of delayed billing, the card-issuer may consider
providing bills and statements of accounts through internet/mobile banking with
<image>
the explicit consent of the cardholder.
requirements.object: statements of accounts through internet/mobile banking with <image> the explicit consent of the cardholder

requirements.full_sentence:
Card-issuers shall put in place a
mechanism to ensure that the cardholder is in receipt of the billing statement.
requirements.object: mechanism to ensure that the cardholder is in receipt of the billing statement

requirements.full_sentence:
Card-issuers shall ensure that wrong bills are not raised and issued to
cardholders.
requirements.object: are not raised and issued to cardholders

requirements.full_sentence:
In case, a cardholder protests any bill, the card-issuer shall provide
explanation and, wherever applicable, documentary evidence shall be provided
to the cardholder within a maximum period of 30 days from the date of complaint.

Card-issuers shall provide the list of payment modes authorised by them for
making payment towards the credit card dues, in their websites and billing
statements.
requirements.object: payment modes authorised by them for making payment towards the credit card dues, in their websites and billing statements

requirements.full_sentence:
Further, card-issuers shall advise cardholders to exercise due
caution and refrain from making payments through modes other than those
authorised by them.
requirements.object: due caution and refrain from making payments through modes other than those authorised by them

requirements.full_sentence:
No charges shall be levied on transactions disputed as 'fraud' by the cardholder
until the dispute is resolved.
requirements.object: disputed as 'fraud' by the cardholder until the dispute is resolved

requirements.full_sentence:
Any debit to the credit card account shall be done as per the authentication
framework prescribed by the Reserve Bank from time to time, and not through
any other mode/instrument.
requirements.object: the authentication framework prescribed by the Reserve Bank from time to time, and not through any other mode/instrument

requirements.full_sentence:
In
order to provide flexibility in this regard, cardholders shall be provided option to
modify the billing cycle of the credit card at least once, as per cardholders'
convenience.
requirements.object: modify the billing cycle of the credit card at least once, as per cardholders' convenience

requirements.full_sentence:
Explanation: The cardholder shall be provided option to choose any date as the
starting or closing day of the billing cycle at least once.
requirements.object: choose any date as the starting or closing day of the billing cycle at least once

requirements.full_sentence:
Further, card-issuers may
provide the option to modify the billing cycle through multiple channels such as
helpline, dedicated e-mail-id, Interactive Voice Response (IVR), internet banking,
mobile-application and any other modes.
requirements.object: modify the billing cycle through multiple channels such as helpline, dedicated e-mail-id, Interactive Voice Response (IVR), inte

requirements.full_sentence:
Any credit amount arising out of refund / failed / reversed transactions or similar
transactions before the due date of payment for which payment has not been
made by the cardholder, shall be immediately adjusted against the 'payment due'
and notified to the cardholder.
requirements.object: the 'payment due' and notified to the cardholder

requirements.full_sentence:
Card-issuers shall seek explicit consent of the cardholder to adjust credit amount
beyond a cut-off, one percent of the credit limit or ₹5000, whichever is lower,
<image>
arising out of refund / failed / reversed transactions or similar transactions against
the credit limit for which payment has already been made by the cardholder.
requirements.object: the cardholder to adjust credit amount beyond a cut-off, one percent of the credit limit or ₹5000, whichever is lower, <image

requirements.full_sentence:
The
consent shall be obtained through e-mail or SMS within seven days of the credit
transaction.
requirements.object: or SMS within seven days of the credit transaction

requirements.full_sentence:
The card-issuers shall reverse the credit transaction to the
cardholder's bank account, if no consent / response is received from the
cardholder.
requirements.object: to the cardholder's bank account

requirements.full_sentence:
Notwithstanding the cut-off, if a cardholder makes a request to the
card-issuer for reversal of the credit amount outstanding in the card account into
his / her bank account, the card-issuer shall do it within three working days from
the receipt of such request.
requirements.object: working days from the receipt of such request

requirements.full_sentence:
The different scenarios for
adjustment of credit are detailed below:
Scenario 1 - Credit of refund / failed / reversed transaction within the same billing
cycle
o Purchase transaction date - October
As bill is yet to be generated in the given case,
the refund amount received on October 19,
15, 2023
2023, shall be adjusted with other debits, prior
o Refund on October 19, 2023 - For
to calculation of the Total Amount Due.
requirements.object: debits, prior o Refund on October 19, 2023 - For to calculation of the Total Amount Due

requirements.full_sentence:
Therefore, the
cancellation of purchase dated October
refund amount received on November 04, 2023,
29, 2023
shall be adjusted towards the Total Amount Due
(TAD) and accordingly the cardholder will be
required to pay only the remaining outstanding
(Remaining outstanding = TAD - Refund
amount).
requirements.object: Total Amount Due (TAD) and accordingly the cardholder will be required to pay only the remaining outstanding (Remaining outsta

requirements.full_sentence:
<image>
Scenario 3 - Credit of refund / failed / reversed transaction for which payment has
already been made
o Purchase transaction date -
As the cardholder has already cleared the dues,
October 30, 2023
card-issuers shall seek explicit consent of the
o Payment towards dues -
cardholder to adjust the refund amount in line
November 06, 2023
with the provision stipulated at paragraph 31 of
o Refund on November 07, 2023 - For
the MD.
requirements.object: the o Payment towards dues - cardholder to adjust the refund amount in line November 06, 2023 with the provision stipulated a

conditions:
If the cardholder gives explicit
cancellation of purchase dated October
consent
requirements.full_sentence:
 Case I - If the cardholder gives explicit
cancellation of purchase dated October
consent, then refund amount shall be
30, 2023
adjusted.

conditions:
if the cardholder makes a request for
crediting the refund (transaction for which
payment has already been made)
requirements.full_sentence:
Further, if the cardholder makes a request for
crediting the refund (transaction for which
payment has already been made), the same
shall be credited back to the bank account of
the cardholder irrespective of the cut off
defined under paragraph 31.
requirements.object: the bank account of the cardholder irrespective of the cut off defined under paragraph 31

requirements.full_sentence:
Note: The card-issuers may put in place a suitable mechanism to prevent
evergreening of the credit facility.
requirements.object: suitable mechanism to prevent evergreening of the credit facility

requirements.full_sentence:
For business credit cards wherein the liability rests fully with the corporate or
business entity (principal account holder), timeframe provided for payment of
dues and adjustment of refunds may be as agreed between the card-issuer and
the principal account holder.
requirements.object: the card-issuer and the principal account holder

requirements.full_sentence:
Unsolicited loans or other credit facilities shall not be offered to the credit
cardholders without seeking explicit consent.
requirements.object: credit cardholders without seeking explicit consent

requirements.full_sentence:
In case an unsolicited credit facility
<image>
is extended without the written / explicit consent of the cardholder and the latter
objects to the same, the card-issuer shall not only withdraw the facility, but also
be liable to pay such penalty as may be considered appropriate by the RBI
Ombudsman, if approached.
requirements.object: but also be liable to pay such penalty as may be considered appropriate by the RBI Ombudsman

requirements.full_sentence: Card-issuers shall not unilaterally upgrade credit cards and enhance credit limits.
requirements.object: and enhance credit limits

requirements.full_sentence:
Explicit consent of the cardholder shall invariably be taken whenever there is/are
any change/s in terms and conditions.
requirements.object: there is/are any change/s in terms and conditions

conditions: In case of reduction in the credit limit
requirements.full_sentence:
In case of reduction in the credit limit, the
card-issuer shall intimate the same to the cardholder.
requirements.object: the cardholder

requirements.full_sentence:
For providing information relating to credit history / repayment record of the
cardholder to a Credit Information Company (that has obtained Certificate of
Registration from RBI), the card-issuer shall explicitly bring to the notice of the
customer that such information is being provided in terms of the Credit
Information Companies (Regulation) Act, 2005.
requirements.object: notice of the customer that such information is being provided in terms of the Credit Information Companies (Regulation) Act,

requirements.full_sentence:
Before reporting default status of a credit cardholder to a Credit Information
Company (CIC), the card-issuers shall ensure that they adhere to the procedure,
approved by their Board, and intimate the cardholder prior to reporting of the
status.
requirements.object: to the procedure, approved by their Board, and intimate the cardholder prior to reporting of the status

requirements.timeline:
within 30
days from the date of settlement
requirements.full_sentence:
In the event the cardholder settles his / her dues after having been
reported as defaulter, the card-issuer shall update the status with CIC within 30
days from the date of settlement.
requirements.object: CIC within 30 days from the date of settlement

requirements.full_sentence:
Card-issuers shall be particularly careful in the
case of cards where there are pending disputes.
requirements.object: the case of cards where there are pending disputes

requirements.full_sentence:
The disclosure / release of
information, particularly about the default, shall be made only after the dispute is
settled.
requirements.object: the dispute is settled

requirements.full_sentence:
In all cases, a well laid down procedure shall be transparently followed
and be made a part of MITC.
requirements.object: be made a part of MITC

requirements.full_sentence:
In the matter of recovery of dues, card-issuers shall ensure that they, as also their
agents, adhere to the extant instructions on Fair Practices Code for lenders.
requirements.object: also their agents, adhere to the extant instructions on Fair Practices Code for lenders

requirements.full_sentence:
In particular, with regard to appointment of third-party agencies for debt collection,
the card-issuers shall ensure that their agents refrain from actions that could
damage their integrity and reputation and observe strict customer confidentiality.
requirements.object: refrain from actions that could damage their integrity and reputation and observe strict customer confidentiality

requirements.full_sentence:
All communications issued by recovery agents must contain the name, email-id,
<image>
telephone number and address of the concerned senior officer of the card-issuer
whom the customer can contact.
requirements.object: <image> telephone number and address of the concerned senior officer of the card-issuer whom the customer can contact

requirements.full_sentence:
Further, card-issuers shall provide the name
and contact details of the recovery agent to the cardholder immediately upon
assigning the agent to the cardholder.
requirements.object: contact details of the recovery agent to the cardholder immediately upon assigning the agent to the cardholder

requirements.full_sentence:
Card-issuers / their agents shall not resort to intimidation or harassment of any
kind, either verbal or physical, against any person in their debt collection efforts,
including acts intended to humiliate publicly or intrude upon the privacy of the
credit cardholders' family members, referees and friends, making threatening and
anonymous calls or making false and misleading representations.
requirements.object: harassment of any kind, either verbal or physical, against any person in their debt collection efforts, including acts inten

requirements.full_sentence:
Card-issuers shall ensure to comply with the extant guidelines in respect of
engagement of recovery agents issued by the Reserve Bank, as amended from
time to time.
requirements.object: the extant guidelines in respect of engagement of recovery agents issued by the Reserve Bank, as amended from time to time

requirements.full_sentence:
The disclosure of customers' information to the DSAs / DMAs / recovery agents
shall also be limited to the extent that will enable them to discharge their duties.
requirements.object: the extent that will enable them to discharge their duties

requirements.full_sentence:
Personal information provided by the cardholder but not required for recovery
purposes shall not be released by the card-issuer.
requirements.object: card-issuer

requirements.full_sentence:
The card-issuer shall ensure
that the DSAs / DMAs / recovery agents do not transfer or misuse any customer
information during marketing of credit card products.
requirements.object: / DMAs / recovery agents do not transfer or misuse any customer information during marketing of credit card products

conditions: When card-issuers outsource various credit card related operations
requirements.full_sentence:
When card-issuers outsource various credit card related operations, they shall be
extremely careful that the appointment of such service providers do not
compromise the quality of the customer service and the card-issuers' ability to
manage credit, liquidity and operational risks.
requirements.object: the appointment of such service providers do not compromise the quality of the customer service and the card-issuers' abilit

requirements.full_sentence:
In the choice of the service
provider, the card-issuers shall be guided by the need to ensure confidentiality of
the customer's records, respect customer privacy and adhere to fair practices in
debt collection.
requirements.object: need to ensure confidentiality of the customer's records, respect customer privacy and adhere to fair practices in debt collection

requirements.full_sentence:
Card-issuers shall have a system of random checks and mystery shopping to
ensure that their agents have been properly briefed and trained as to how to
handle customers and are also aware of their responsibilities, particularly with
regard to soliciting customers, hours for calling, privacy of customer information,
conveying the correct terms and conditions of the product on offer.
requirements.object: random checks and mystery shopping to ensure that their agents have been properly briefed and trained as to how to handle customers a

requirements.full_sentence:
Card-issuers shall ensure that their employees/agents do not indulge in mis-
selling of credit cards by providing incomplete or incorrect information to the
<image>
customers, prior to the issuance of a credit card.
requirements.object: do not indulge in mis- selling of credit cards by providing incomplete or incorrect information to the <image> cust

requirements.full_sentence:
The card-issuers shall also be
liable for the acts of their agents.
requirements.object: the acts of their agents

requirements.full_sentence:
Repetitive complaints received in this regard
against any employee / agent shall be taken on record by the card-issuer and
appropriate action shall be initiated against them including blacklisting of such
agents.
requirements.object: by the card-issuer and appropriate action shall be initiated against them including blacklisting of such agents

requirements.full_sentence:
A dedicated helpline and email-id shall be available for the cardholders
to raise complaints against any act of mis-selling or harassment by the
representative of the card-issuer.
requirements.object: cardholders to raise complaints against any act of mis-selling or harassment by the representative of the card-issuer

requirements.full_sentence:
Card-issuers may issue other form factors in place of / in addition to a plastic
credit card such as wearables, after obtaining explicit consent from the customer.
requirements.object: in place of / in addition to a plastic credit card such as wearables, after obtaining explicit consent from the customer

requirements.full_sentence:
Form factors shall be subject to all the specific and general guidelines applicable
to the respective cards.
requirements.object: the specific and general guidelines applicable to the respective cards

requirements.full_sentence:
Card-issuers shall provide options for disabling or blocking the form factor in line
with the instructions issued by the Reserve Bank from time to time.
requirements.object: or blocking the form factor in line with the instructions issued by the Reserve Bank from time to time

requirements.full_sentence:
In addition to the conditions listed herein, the co-
branding arrangement for credit cards and prepaid cards shall also be subject to
the specific conditions applicable to such cards.
requirements.object: the specific conditions applicable to such cards

requirements.full_sentence:
The co-branded card shall explicitly indicate that the card has been issued under
a cobranding arrangement.
requirements.object: card has been issued under a cobranding arrangement

requirements.full_sentence:
The co-branding partner shall not advertise / market
the co-branded card as its own product.
requirements.object: co-branded card as its own product

requirements.full_sentence:
In all marketing / advertising material,
the name of the card-issuer shall be clearly shown.
The co-branded card shall prominently bear the branding of the card-issuer.
requirements.object: of the card-issuer

requirements.full_sentence:
The co-branding arrangement shall be as per the Board approved policy of the
card-issuer.
requirements.object: Board approved policy of the card-issuer

requirements.full_sentence:
The policy shall specifically address issues pertaining to various
risks, including reputation risk associated with such an arrangement and put in
place suitable risk mitigation measures.
requirements.object: to various risks, including reputation risk associated with such an arrangement and put in place suitable risk

requirements.full_sentence:
Further, the information relating to
revenue sharing between the card-issuer and the cobranding partner entity shall
be indicated to the cardholder and also displayed on the website of the card-
issuer.
requirements.object: cardholder and also displayed on the website of the card- issuer

requirements.full_sentence:
Card-issuers shall carry out due diligence in respect of the co-branding partner
entity with which they intend to enter into tie-up for issue of such cards to protect
themselves against the reputation risk they are exposed to in such an
arrangement.
requirements.object: in respect of the co-branding partner entity with which they intend to enter into tie-up for issue of such cards to protect th

conditions:
where the proposed co-
branding partner is a financial entity
requirements.full_sentence:
Card-issuers shall ensure that in cases where the proposed co-
branding partner is a financial entity, it has obtained necessary approvals from its
regulator for entering into the co-branding arrangement.
requirements.object: where the proposed co- branding partner is a financial entity, it has obtained necessary approvals from its regulator for enterin

requirements.full_sentence: Card-issuers shall also be liable for the acts of the co-branding partner.
requirements.object: the acts of the co-branding partner

requirements.full_sentence:
The card-
issuer shall ensure adherence to Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial
Companies - Managing Risks in Outsourcing) Directions, 2025, as amended
from time to time.
requirements.object: Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Managing Risks in Outsourcing) Directions, 2025, as amended from time to

requirements.full_sentence:
Card-issuers shall ensure that cash backs, discounts and other
offers advertised by a co-branding partner are delivered to the cardholder on time.
requirements.object: discounts and other offers advertised by a co-branding partner are delivered to the cardholder on time

requirements.full_sentence:
Card-issuers shall be liable for any delay or non-delivery of the same to the
cardholders.
requirements.object: delay or non-delivery of the same to the cardholders

requirements.full_sentence:
The role of the co-branding partner entity under the tie-up arrangement shall be
limited to marketing / distribution of the cards and providing access to the
cardholder for the goods / services that are offered.
requirements.object: / distribution of the cards and providing access to the cardholder for the goods / services that are offered

requirements.full_sentence:
The co-branding partner (CBP) shall not have access to information relating to
transactions undertaken through the co-branded card irrespective of any other
service offered by them to the card-issuer.
requirements.object: relating to transactions undertaken through the co-branded card irrespective of any other service offered by them to the ca

requirements.full_sentence:
Post issuance of the card, the CBP
shall not be involved in any of the processes or the controls relating to the co-
branded card except for being the initial point of contact in case of grievances.
requirements.object: of the processes or the controls relating to the co- branded card except for being the initial point of contact in case of grievanc

requirements.full_sentence:
However, for the purpose of cardholder's convenience, card transaction related
data may be drawn directly from the card-issuer's system in an encrypted form
and displayed in the CBP's platform with robust security.
requirements.object: the card-issuer's system in an encrypted form and displayed in the CBP's platform with robust security

requirements.full_sentence:
The information
displayed through the CBP's platform shall be visible only to the cardholder and
shall neither be accessed nor be stored by the CBP.
requirements.object: the cardholder and shall neither be accessed nor be stored by the CBP

requirements.full_sentence:
Prior approval shall not be required by the NBFCs registered with the Reserve
Bank to become a co-branding partner of card-issuers.
requirements.object: NBFCs registered with the Reserve Bank to become a co-branding partner of card-issuers

requirements.full_sentence:
The role of the co-
branding partner shall be as per the conditions stipulated under paragraphs 55
and 56.
requirements.object: conditions stipulated under paragraphs 55 and 56

requirements.full_sentence:
Card-issuers shall keep internal records to enable operations to be traced and
errors to be rectified (taking into account the law of limitation for the time barred
cases) as prescribed under Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial
Companies - Know Your Customer) Directions, 2025, as amended from time to
time.
requirements.object: enable operations to be traced and errors to be rectified (taking into account the law of limitation for the time barred case

requirements.full_sentence:
The cardholder shall be provided with a record of the transactions after he / she
has completed it, immediately in the form of receipt or another form such as the
bank statement / email / SMS.
requirements.object: record of the transactions after he / she has completed it, immediately in the form of receipt or another form such as the bank sta

requirements.full_sentence:
With a view to reducing the instances of misuse of lost / stolen cards, it is
recommended to the card-issuers that they may consider issuing card with
advanced features that may evolve from time to time.
requirements.object: advanced features that may evolve from time to time

conditions: In case card-issuers
requirements.full_sentence:
In case card-issuers, at their discretion, decide to block / deactivate / suspend a
credit card, it shall be ensured that a standard operating procedure is followed as
approved by their Board.
requirements.object: standard operating procedure is followed as approved by their Board

requirements.full_sentence:
Further, it shall also be ensured that blocking /
deactivating / suspending a card or withdrawal of benefits available on any card
is immediately intimated to the cardholder along with reasons thereof through
electronic means (SMS, email, etc.) and other available modes.
requirements.object: blocking / deactivating / suspending a card or withdrawal of benefits available on any card is immediately intimated to the cardh

requirements.full_sentence:
Card-issuers shall block a lost card immediately on being informed by the
cardholder and formalities, if any, can follow within a reasonable period clearly
defined in the Board approved policy.
requirements.object: immediately on being informed by the cardholder and formalities

requirements.full_sentence:
Card-issuers shall provide to the cardholder the detailed procedure to report the
loss, theft or unauthorised use of card or PIN.
requirements.object: the detailed procedure to report the loss, theft or unauthorised use of card or PIN

requirements.full_sentence:
They shall provide multiple
channels such as a dedicated helpline, dedicated number for SMS, dedicated e-
mail-id, Interactive Voice Response, clearly visible link on the website, internet
<image>
banking and mobile-app or any other mode for reporting an unauthorized
transaction on 24 x 7 basis and allow the customer to initiate the blocking of the
card.
requirements.object: as a dedicated helpline, dedicated number for SMS, dedicated e- mail-id, Interactive Voice Response, clearly visible li

requirements.full_sentence:
The process for blocking the card, dedicated helpline as well as the SMS
numbers, shall be adequately publicized and included in the billing statements.
requirements.object: included in the billing statements

requirements.full_sentence:
Card-issuers shall immediately send a confirmation to the cardholder subsequent
to the blocking of a card.
requirements.object: to the cardholder subsequent to the blocking of a card

requirements.full_sentence: A card-issuer shall not dispatch a card to a customer unsolicited.
requirements.object: a customer unsolicited

conditions:
In case of
renewal of an existing card
requirements.full_sentence:
In case of
renewal of an existing card, the cardholder shall be provided an option to decline
the same if he / she wants to do so before dispatching the renewed card.
requirements.object: to decline the same if he / she wants to do so before dispatching the renewed card

conditions: in case a card is blocked at the request of the cardholder
requirements.full_sentence:
Further,
in case a card is blocked at the request of the cardholder, replacement card in
lieu of the blocked card shall be issued with the explicit consent of the cardholder.
requirements.object: explicit consent of the cardholder

requirements.full_sentence:
Any discounts, cashbacks, reward points, loyalty points or any other benefits
offered by the card-issuer shall be provided in a transparent manner including
source of such benefits.
requirements.object: transparent manner including source of such benefits

requirements.full_sentence:
The accounting process for the same shall be verifiable
in the books of the card-issuer.
requirements.object: books of the card-issuer

requirements.full_sentence:
Detailed information regarding these benefits shall
be displayed on the website of the card-issuer and a copy of the same shall also
be provided to the cardholder.
requirements.object: website of the card-issuer and a copy of the same shall also be provided to the cardholder

conditions:
in case a card-issuer or a card payment network provides
an insurance cover
requirements.full_sentence:
However, in case a card-issuer or a card payment network provides
an insurance cover, complimentary or chargeable (with the consent of the
cardholder), the card-issuer shall ensure that the relevant nomination details are
recorded by the Insurance Company and the availability of insurance is included,
along with other information, in every statement.
requirements.object: nomination details are recorded by the Insurance Company and the availability of insurance is included, along with other info

requirements.full_sentence:
The information shall also
include the details regarding the insurance cover, name / address and telephone
number of the Insurance Company which will handle the claims relating to the
insurance cover.
requirements.object: regarding the insurance cover, name / address and telephone number of the Insurance Company which will handle the claims rela

conditions: In case of group insurance policy
requirements.full_sentence:
In case of group insurance policy, the contact details of the
concerned officials of the card-issuer shall be provided in the statements.
requirements.object: statements

requirements.full_sentence: The relationship between the card-issuer and the cardholder shall be contractual.

Card-issuers shall make available to the cardholders in writing, a set of
contractual terms and conditions governing the issue and use of such cards.
requirements.object: cardholders in writing, a set of contractual terms and conditions governing the issue and use of such cards

requirements.full_sentence:
<image>
These terms shall be expressed clearly and also maintain a fair balance between
the interests of the parties concerned.
requirements.object: also maintain a fair balance between the interests of the parties concerned

requirements.full_sentence:
The terms and conditions for the issue and usage of a card shall be mentioned
in clear and simple language (preferably in English, Hindi and the local language)
comprehensible to the cardholder.
requirements.object: and simple language (preferably in English, Hindi and the local language) comprehensible to the cardholder

requirements.full_sentence:
Card-issuers shall not levy any charge that was not explicitly indicated to the
cardholder at the time of issue of the card and without getting his / her explicit
consent.
requirements.object: was not explicitly indicated to the cardholder at the time of issue of the card and without getting his / her explicit consent

requirements.full_sentence:
However, this shall not be applicable to charges like service taxes which
may subsequently be levied by the Government or any other statutory authority.
requirements.object: like service taxes which may subsequently be levied by the Government or any other statutory authority

requirements.full_sentence:
The details of all the charges associated with cards shall be displayed on the
card-issuer's website.
requirements.object: card-issuer's website

conditions: if any charged on specific transactions
requirements.full_sentence:
The convenience fee, if any charged on specific transactions, shall be indicated
to the cardholder in a transparent manner, prior to the transaction.
requirements.object: cardholder in a transparent manner, prior to the transaction

requirements.full_sentence:
The terms shall clearly specify the time-period for reversal of unsuccessful / failed
transactions and the compensation payable for failure to meet the specified
timeline.
requirements.object: for reversal of unsuccessful / failed transactions and the compensation payable for failure to meet the specified time

requirements.full_sentence:
The terms may be altered by the card-issuer, but 30 days' notice of the change
shall be given to the cardholder to enable him / her to withdraw if he / she so
chooses.
requirements.object: cardholder to enable him / her to withdraw if he / she so chooses

requirements.full_sentence:
The change in terms shall be notified to the cardholder through all the
communication channels available.
requirements.object: cardholder through all the communication channels available

conditions:
if access is gained
to such a record
requirements.full_sentence:
The terms shall put the cardholder under an obligation to take all appropriate
steps to keep the card safe and not to record the PIN or code, in any form that
would be intelligible or otherwise accessible to any third party if access is gained
to such a record, either honestly or dishonestly.
requirements.object: an obligation to take all appropriate steps to keep the card safe and not to record the PIN or code, in any form that would b

conditions:
when issuing PINs
or codes and shall be under an obligation not to disclose the cardholder's PIN or
code to anyone
requirements.full_sentence:
The terms shall specify that the card-issuer shall exercise care when issuing PINs
or codes and shall be under an obligation not to disclose the cardholder's PIN or
code to anyone, except to the cardholder.
requirements.object: shall exercise care when issuing PINs or codes and shall be under an obligation not to disclose the cardholder's PIN or code to anyone

requirements.full_sentence:
The issue of cards as a payment mechanism shall also be subject to relevant
instructions on cash withdrawal, issue of international card, security issues and
risk mitigation measures, card-to-card fund transfers, merchant discount rates
structure, failed ATM transactions, etc, issued by the Department of Payment and
Settlement Systems, Reserve Bank of India under the Payment and Settlement
Systems Act, 2007, and the Foreign Exchange Department, Reserve Bank of
India under Foreign Exchange Management Act, 1999, as amended from time to
time.
requirements.object: relevant instructions on cash withdrawal, issue of international card, security issues and risk mitigation measures, card-to-card f

requirements.full_sentence:
Card-issuers shall put in place a Grievance Redressal Mechanism within the card
issuing entity and give wide publicity about it through electronic and print media.
requirements.object: Grievance Redressal Mechanism within the card issuing entity and give wide publicity about it through electronic and print media

requirements.full_sentence:
The name, direct contact number, email-id and postal address of the designated
grievance redressal officer of the card-issuer shall be mentioned on the credit
card bills and account statements.
requirements.object: credit card bills and account statements

requirements.full_sentence:
The designated officer shall ensure that
grievances of cardholders are redressed promptly without any delay.
requirements.object: cardholders are redressed promptly without any delay

requirements.full_sentence:
Specific
timelines may be stipulated in the Board approved policy for issuance of cards,
redressal of grievances and compensation framework.
requirements.object: Board approved policy for issuance of cards, redressal of grievances and compensation framework

requirements.full_sentence:
The grievance redressal
procedure and the Board approved policy shall be displayed on the website of
the card-issuer with a clearly visible link on the homepage.
requirements.object: website of the card-issuer with a clearly visible link on the homepage

requirements.full_sentence:
Card-issuers shall ensure that their call centre staff are trained adequately to
competently handle and escalate, a complaint, if necessary.
requirements.object: centre staff are trained adequately to competently handle and escalate, a complaint

requirements.full_sentence:
The Grievance
Redressal process shall have a provision for automatic escalation of unresolved
complaints from a call center / base level to higher authorities.
requirements.object: automatic escalation of unresolved complaints from a call center / base level to higher authorities

requirements.full_sentence:
There shall be a
system of acknowledging customers' complaints for follow up, such as complaint
number / docket number, even if the complaints are received over phone.
requirements.object: acknowledging customers' complaints for follow up, such as complaint number / docket number, even if the complaints are received over p

requirements.full_sentence:
Card-issuers shall be liable to compensate the complainant for the loss of his /
her time, expenses, financial loss as well as for the harassment and mental
anguish suffered by him / her for the fault of the card-issuer and where the
grievance has not been redressed in time.
requirements.object: the complainant for the loss of his / her time, expenses, financial loss as well as for the harassment and mental anguish suff

requirements.full_sentence:
For redressal of his / her grievance,
the customer must first approach the concerned card-issuer.
requirements.object: card-issuer

requirements.full_sentence:
Card-issuers shall not reveal any information relating to customers obtained at
the time of opening the account or issuing the card to any other person or
organization without obtaining their explicit consent, with regard to the purpose/s
for which the information will be used and the organizations with whom the
information will be shared.
requirements.object: to customers obtained at the time of opening the account or issuing the card to any other person or organization witho

requirements.full_sentence:
Card-issuers shall ensure strict compliance to the
extant legal framework on data protection.
requirements.object: the extant legal framework on data protection

conditions:
in case where the customers
give explicit consent for sharing the information provided by them with other
agencies
requirements.full_sentence:
Further, in case where the customers
give explicit consent for sharing the information provided by them with other
agencies, card-issuers shall clearly state and explain to the customer the full
meaning / implications of the disclosure clause.
requirements.object: to the customer the full meaning / implications of the disclosure clause

requirements.full_sentence:
The information sought from
customers shall not be of such nature which will violate the provisions of law
relating to maintenance of secrecy in the transactions.
requirements.object: which will violate the provisions of law relating to maintenance of secrecy in the transactions

requirements.full_sentence:
The card-issuers shall be
solely responsible for the correctness or otherwise of the data provided for the
purpose.
requirements.object: the correctness or otherwise of the data provided for the purpose

requirements.full_sentence:
Under a co-branding arrangement, the co-branding entity shall not be permitted
to access any details of customer's accounts that may violate the card-issuer's
secrecy obligations.
requirements.object: any details of customer's accounts that may violate the card-issuer's secrecy obligations

requirements.full_sentence:
Card-issuers shall ensure adherence to the Reserve Bank of
India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Managing Risks in Outsourcing)
<image>
Directions, 2025, as amended from time to time.
requirements.object: Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Managing Risks in Outsourcing) <image> Directions, 2025, as amended f

requirements.full_sentence:
Further, the card-issuers shall
not share card data (including transaction data) of the cardholders with the
outsourcing partners unless sharing of such data is essential to discharge the
functions assigned to the latter.
requirements.object: transaction data) of the cardholders with the outsourcing partners unless sharing of such data is essential to discharge th

conditions: In case of sharing of any data as stated above
requirements.full_sentence:
In case of sharing of any data as stated above,
explicit consent from the cardholder shall be obtained.

It shall also be ensured
that the storage and the ownership of card data remains with the card-issuer.
requirements.object: the storage and the ownership of card data remains with the card-issuer

requirements.full_sentence:
The instructions / Directions on KYC / AML / CFT issued by RBI from time to time,
shall be strictly adhered to in respect of all cards issued, including co-branded
cards.
requirements.object: in respect of all cards issued, including co-branded cards

requirements.full_sentence: Card-issuers shall provide to the cardholder the term-sheet containing the MITC.
requirements.object: the term-sheet containing the MITC

requirements.full_sentence:
The document should contain the following details:
(1) Fees and Charges
requirements.object: (1) Fees and Charges

requirements.full_sentence:
Items to be disclosed in stages:
(1) During marketing - Item no: 85(1)
(2) At application - Key fact statement containing items from 85 (1) to (3) and any
additional information that the customer may desire.
(i) The font size of MITC shall be minimum Arial-12

(ii) The normal terms and conditions communicated by the card-issuer to the
cardholder at different stages shall continue as hitherto.

The
Directions, instructions and guidelines already repealed shall continue to remain
repealed.

Notwithstanding such repeal, any action taken or purported to have been taken,
or initiated under the repealed Directions, instructions, or guidelines shall
continue to be governed by the provisions thereof.
requirements.object: by the provisions thereof

requirements.full_sentence:
All approvals or
acknowledgments granted under these repealed lists shall be deemed as
governed by these Directions.
requirements.object: by these Directions
affect: (1) any right, obligation or liability acquired, accrued, or incurred thereunder

conditions: if those directions
requirements.full_sentence:
and any such investigation, legal proceedings or remedy may
be instituted, continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or
punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or
guidelines had not been repealed.
requirements.object: enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guideline

requirements.full_sentence:
The provisions of these Directions shall be in addition to, and not in derogation of
the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time
being in force.
requirements.object: and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in force

conditions: if it considers necessary
requirements.full_sentence:
For the purpose of giving effect to the provisions of these Directions or in order
to remove any difficulties in the application or interpretation of the provisions of
these Directions, the RBI may, if it considers necessary, issue necessary
<image>
clarifications in respect of any matter covered herein and the interpretation of any
provision of these Directions given by the RBI shall be final and binding.
